name: plan-loop-executor
description: Execute written implementation plans through a controller-owned, test-first task loop.

interface.shortDescription: Run implementation plans as verified controller boards.
interface.longDescription: Turns a substantive written plan into a durable execution board and read-only HTML kanban snapshot, then works it through a controller-owned loop with test-first tasks, bounded retries, safe sub-agent fan-out, integration gates, and explicit close-out.
defaultPrompt: Execute this implementation plan with the plan loop executor.
Turn this plan into a controller board and work it.
Resume the active plan loop board in this repo.
